overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through downtown Los Santos. The scene begins under a concrete highway overpass with artificial lighting, transitions to open city streets, and continues along a brick-paved avenue past a large illuminated civic building with colorful banners, surrounded by modern glass skyscrapers against a clear night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete pedestrian walkway under highway overpass

events.description: pedestrian in white hat and vest walks toward camera and passes by on the left
black SUV drives past on the left side of the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered underpass toward the city lights visible at the far end

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing white hat and patterned vest walking toward the camera and passing by

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass forming a tunnel-like enclosure overhead
rough textured concrete wall running along the right side of the walkway
multi-lane road with moving traffic visible through the overpass opening
overhead fluorescent tube lights mounted on the concrete ceiling illuminating the underpass

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a covered walkway under a highway overpass with rough concrete walls and ceiling illuminated by fluorescent lights. A pedestrian in distinctive clothing walks toward and passes the camera, while vehicles drive by on the street to the left. The camera moves steadily forward toward the distant city lights visible at the overpass exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner at overpass exit with civic building

events.description: exits the covered overpass into open air with city skyline visible
turns right onto the brick-paved sidewalk alongside the large white civic building

agents.ego_description: exits the underpass and turns right onto the city sidewalk, heading toward the intersection with traffic lights

entered.detail: dark clear night sky visible above the urban skyline
illuminated modern high-rise buildings with many lit windows dominating the left side
large white building with tall columns and colorful vertical banners illuminated against the night
traffic light suspended over the intersection showing red

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered underpass into the open night air, revealing a panoramic view of the downtown skyline with illuminated glass skyscrapers. Turning right onto a brick-paved sidewalk, the scene opens up to show a large white civic building with columns and colorful banners on the right, while traffic lights and the city street occupy the center view.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown city sidewalk along major avenue with civic building

events.description: crossing a marked crosswalk as the traffic light changes to green
black sedan and other vehicles drive past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the brick-paved sidewalk past the illuminated civic building, crossing a side street intersection

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the avenue parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: white painted zebra crossing stripes on the brick pavement
tall black street lamp with warm yellow illumination
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk near the civic building entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wide brick-paved avenue, the camera passes the grand white civic building with its tall columns and colorful banners now prominent on the right. The scene features tall palm trees and street lamps illuminating the path, while modern glass skyscrapers rise on the left. The camera crosses a marked crosswalk as vehicles drive by on the street, with the traffic signal changing from red to green.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown avenue continuing past civic building toward next intersection

events.description: slight curve in the sidewalk path as the building recedes into the background

agents.ego_description: continuing down the concrete sidewalk with the civic building now alongside and receding, approaching the next street corner

entered.detail: cluster of illuminated skyscrapers and high-rise buildings visible down the avenue

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the concrete sidewalk as the large civic building gradually recedes into the background on the right. The path curves slightly, revealing more of the distant city skyline with numerous illuminated towers ahead. Street lamps continue to line the left side of the walkway, and sparse pedestrian activity is visible further down the avenue.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive enclosure of a concrete underpass into the expansive, illuminated grandeur of a downtown city center. It begins beneath a highway overpass with rough concrete walls and fluorescent lighting, moving forward past a pedestrian and passing traffic toward the distant city lights. As the camera exits the covered walkway into the open night air, the scene expands to reveal a panoramic skyline of glass skyscrapers before turning right onto a brick-paved sidewalk. The path then leads past a grand white civic building adorned with columns and colorful banners, passing under street lamps and palm trees as the camera crosses a marked intersection. Finally, the civic building recedes into the background as the walkway curves, opening up to a wide view of numerous illuminated towers stretching across the distant horizon.
